records.ety: [Gr. di- = di`s- twice + <?/ belly: cf. F. digastrique.]

defs: Having two bellies; biventral; -- applied to muscles which are fleshy at each end and have a tendon in the middle, and esp. to the muscle which pulls down the lower jaw.
Pertaining to the digastric muscle of the lower jaw; as, the digastric nerves.
